tl_items.title: AI Rewires Brains: Tom Slater's Insightful Essay | Pete Matthew posted on the topic | LinkedIn
tl_items.snippet: This is the best thing I’ve read on AI in ages - a brilliant essay by Tom Slater of Scottish Mortgage Investment Trust (whom I’m unable to tag) about how AI is physically rewiring our brains. It is immaculately written, very easy to digest and might be the most important thing you read this year.

blocked_items.title: Citi Deploys 4 AI Tools Across Wealth Division, Automating Notes, Research Queries and Client 360 Views
blocked_items.reason: Fabrication detected: Client 360 rollout timeline contradiction: Entry states 'full rollout planned for April 2026', but source states full rollout to Citi Private Bank and Wealth at Work is planned for 'this month' (April 2026) with ALL Wealth colleagues gaining access in Q2 2026 — the entry omits the Q2 2026 phase and mischaracterizes the rollout scope.; Portfolio Intelligence global rollout: Entry states 'global rollout through year-end', but source specifies expanding to Private Bank clients globally in Q2 first, then all Wealth clients by year-end — the entry collapses these two phases into one.; CitiScribe description: Entry states it 'automates meeting note-taking', but source describes it as 'automates note-taking, summarizing client discussions' — minor but the entry's characterization is consistent enough to not be a hard fail.; Citi Stylus Workspaces launch: Entry states 'launched in September 2025' which is consistent with source reference to 'Last September' (published April 2026).
